theme_notes: Taglines draw from: Viktor Orbán's landslide election defeat in Hungary, Japan's 7.7-magnitude earthquake and tsunami warning, the US-Iran Strait of Hormuz standoff (US Navy seized an Iranian ship; Strait closed again), and the Champions League semifinal lineup confirmed. Minor satellites: the Blake Lively vs. Baldoni case going to trial, and the Michael Jackson biopic 'Michael' opening April 24.
settled: Zero. Like Viktor Orbán's remaining political career. Swept clean.
Even. Japan had a 7.7 earthquake today. You had this. Far less dramatic.
Settled. The MJ estate is still litigating. You two are ahead of schedule.
youOwe: Smaller than Orbán's margin of error. He was wrong by landslides.
Less than a seismograph calibration fee. Japan used theirs today.
A blip. The MJ biopic will gross more in the first hour. Show some range.
Blake Lively's legal team charges this per sentence. You owe it for months.
Arsenal made the Champions League semis for less heart. Embarrassing.
You owe what Atlético beat Barcelona by. They at least showed up.
Orbán ran a country for 15 years. You can't run a $300 tab to zero.
Japan issued and lifted a tsunami warning faster than you'll clear this.
PSG are in the UCL semis. You're still in the 'I'll get the next one' era.
The Strait of Hormuz closed again. Your finances: also inaccessible.
Blake Lively is going to trial. You're going to keep owing this.
This reads as 7.7 on the financial Richter scale. Everyone felt the tremor.
Orbán's entire campaign couldn't save him. Nothing's saving your credit either.
The US Navy seized an Iranian ship for less of a principle than this.
Japan had a 7.7 and still issued a shorter recovery than your repayment timeline.
You've personally closed the Strait of Hormuz of this relationship.
The MJ biopic cost less to produce. You're not Thriller. You're the debt.
Kash Patel wants $250M from The Atlantic. You're starting to find him relatable.
theyOwe: Less than a footnote in Orbán's defeat speech. Still real. Still owed.
A rounding error. Iran uses this logic too. Still a problem.
Almost nothing. The MJ biopic opens this week. At least see that.
Orbán got no grace period. Neither should they.
PSG didn't accept moral victories. Take note.
Arsenal is in the UCL semis. You're still waiting on a Venmo from months ago.
A 7.7 quake caused less structural damage than their excuse pile.
The Strait of Hormuz reopened, then closed again. Their debt mirrors this.
Blake Lively had 10 claims dismissed and is still going to trial. Take notes.
Hungary ousted Orbán by a landslide. This debt ousted your patience.
Japan issued a tsunami warning in minutes. You've been waiting months.
Bayern and PSG both made the UCL semis. You're still in mediation.
The US Navy seized an Iranian ship for less provocation. Federal energy required.
Blake is taking Baldoni to trial. Start writing your opening statement.
Orbán's Hungary survived 15 years. Your goodwill didn't survive this.
The Strait of Hormuz closing cost billions in blocked trade. You're close.
The MJ estate has been litigating for decades. Buckle in. This is that now.
Japan's earthquake registered 7.7. This debt registers higher on the damage scale.
